notes: This gate SURVIVES Chunk 7's deletion of the P0-A high-retrieval lane and self-consistency voting -- it is the one piece of eligibility machinery this suite pins as frozen-migration-input rather than re-baseline @ 7.

Contains only fixture-local ref names (tests/fixtures/goldens/improve/fixture-refs.ts), booleans, and counts -- no production refs.
